description: Flexible multi-leg, multi-airport flight search - cheapest valid combination across an itinerary.
name: io.github.leojg/rihla

environmentVariables.description: Travelpayouts Data API token (free) - the primary price source. Without any keys the server runs on offline mock data.
environmentVariables.name: TRAVELPAYOUTS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: SerpApi key (optional, 250 free searches/mo) - fills routes Travelpayouts misses with bookable Google Flights fares.
environmentVariables.name: SERPAPI_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Source profile: 'local' (all configured sources), 'hosted' (redistribution-licensed only), or 'mock' (offline).
environmentVariables.name: RIHLA_PROFILE
